_source: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 + alpha-3 + World Bank region + income group. Currency from ISO 4217. Default UI locale chosen from our 15 supported languages based on majority/official tongue. Automation calibration multiplier derived from income group (HIC 0.97 / UMC 0.82 / LMC 0.70 / LIC 0.55) with small SSA adjustment. Snapshot=true marks the 3 hand-curated countries (GH/BD/KE) with full ILOSTAT-derived wage and growth tables. All other countries fall through the synthesised baseline + live World Bank fallback path.
